comment.body: I think the answer to this riddle is less some elaborate 3D chess but just plain necessity. Everything was posted in this chat earlier today. MOVE went to an absolute extreme reading, 10y yields spiking, this has a huge effect on the plumbing of the financial system. TSYs are used as collateral in interbank trades and big changes in their value means banks have to cover their margin calls which puts their liquidity buffers under stress. Also prime brokers reduce margin loans and increase margin requirements. So hedge funds unwind their trades and start with the most liquid stuff first (TSYs). Let this play out too long and you create a full blown financial crisis of the kind nobody wants. So I think Trump and his advisors realized that looking stupid might be the lesser of two evils and that the market needs to be stabilized now. So short term I think we will see more sideways or bullish action combined with a vol crush. Once the waters are a little calmer, we might see another leg down

TSYs are used as collateral in interbank trades and big changes in their value means banks have to cover their margin calls which puts their liquidity buffers under stress. Also prime brokers reduce margin loans and increase margin requirements. So hedge funds unwind their trades and start with the most liquid stuff first (TSYs). Let this play out too long and you create a full blown financial crisis of the kind nobody wants. So I think Trump and his advisors realized that looking stupid might be the lesser of two evils and that the market needs to be stabilized now.
